# services.buildkite-agents

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.buildkite-agents`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.buildkite-agents` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of buildkite agents. The attribute key is combined with the hostname and a unique integer to create the final agent name. This can be overridden by setting the `name` attribute. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.dataDir` | `string` | The workdir for the agent |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable this buildkite agent |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra lines to be added verbatim to the configuration file. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.checkout` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The `checkout` hook script will replace the default checkout routine of the bootstrap.sh script. You can use this hook to do your own SCM checkout behaviour |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.command` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The `command` hook script will replace the default implementation of running the build command. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.environment` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The `environment` hook will run before all other commands, and can be used to set up secrets, data, etc. Anything exported in hooks will be available to the build script. Note: the contents of this file will be copied to the world-readable Nix store. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.post-artifact` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The `post-artifact` hook will run just after artifacts are uploaded |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.post-checkout` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The `post-checkout` hook will run after the bootstrap script has checked out your projects source code. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.post-command` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The `post-command` hook will run after the bootstrap script has run your build commands |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.pre-artifact` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The `pre-artifact` hook will run just before artifacts are uploaded |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.pre-checkout` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The `pre-checkout` hook will run just before your projects source code is checked out from your SCM provider |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.pre-command` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The `pre-command` hook will run just before your build command runs |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.pre-exit` | `null or strings concatenated with "\n"` | The `pre-exit` hook will run just before your build job finishes |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooksPath` | `absolute path` | Path to the directory storing the hooks. Consider using {option}`services.buildkite-agents.<name>.hooks.<name>` instead. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.name` | `string` | The name of the agent as seen in the buildkite dashboard. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.package` | `package` | Which buildkite-agent derivation to use |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.preCommands` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra commands to run before starting buildkite. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.privateSshKeyPath` | `null or absolute path` | OpenSSH private key A run-time path to the key file, which is supposed to be provisioned outside of Nix store. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.runtimePackages` | `list of (package or absolute path)` | Add programs to the buildkite-agent environment |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.shell` | `string` | Command that buildkite-agent 3 will execute when it spawns a shell. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.tags` | `attribute set of (string or list of string)` | Tags for the agent. |
| `services.buildkite-agents.<name>.tokenPath` | `absolute path` | The token from your Buildkite "Agents" page. A run-time path to the token file, which is supposed to be provisioned outside of Nix store. |
